name: cc-usage-guard
description: Pause-at-limit guard for Claude Code. A statusLine sensor records 5h + weekly rate-limit usage; PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit hooks watch it in two tiers: a soft WARN nudge on approach, then a hard PARK that pauses the session, schedules a one-shot auto-resume cron for just after the window resets, and fires a push notification. Spawned agents (subagents, teammates) wind down and hand back instead of parking, and if the sensor goes dark the guard warns instead of going silently blind. Per-profile state, per-window thresholds; see the README for details.
